message:
fix(test): add missing cfg(feature=vendored) gate to proptest_vendored.rs

The proptest_vendored.rs file imports from frankenterm_core::vendored
which is behind the "vendored" feature flag. Without the cfg gate,
cargo check --all-targets fails with unresolved import errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
